redacted_summary: Updated the troubleshooting guidance for cases where automated script repair and AI repair have both already failed: escalate to the appropriate platform support role instead of repeating repair steps. Added a reusable diagnostic path for apparent bot non-response: first verify whether backend tool calls are still running or delayed, then try an alternate model if needed. Added a configuration-related check for chat-connector failures: ensure the chat plugin is enabled, restart the service, and verify connector identity resolution, websocket readiness, service health, and integration configuration.
